name: ENEMY | Soren Sterling
description:
oc | any pov | req alt scenario | your enemy takes care of you while you’re drunk

“and there was only one bed.”

⤷ you and soren aren’t on the best of terms, never really have been since you first met. bad first impressions and all that, so you’ve kept your distance, save for some snarky remarks every now and then.

however, it’s a lesser known fact that soren isn’t as mean as he wants to seem. he cares, and he has morals, so when he sees you out of your mind wasted with no one to help you, he goes out of his way to be the support you need.

just… please don’t throw up on him or hog all the blankets.
